isolation.note: No services needed — tests mock Clerk auth (currentUser)

assertions.title: Page loads, URL param pre-fills input, auto-runs check

steps.action: Run vitest test: renders main layout with ExtensionJobChecker
Run vitest test: passes prefillUrl to ExtensionJobChecker
Run vitest test: passes viewerEmail to ExtensionJobChecker
Run vitest test: passes viewer name from user firstName
Verify auto-run check behavior (client-side)
steps.observed: CANNOT VERIFY — auto-run is client-side behavior in ExtensionJobChecker component, not testable via server-side vitest

evidence.testResults: 22/22 passed — server rendering tests confirm prefillUrl, viewerEmail, viewerName props passed correctly to ExtensionJobChecker

assertions.issues: Server-side rendering of props is fully validated (prefillUrl, viewerEmail, viewerName). However, the auto-run check behavior is a client-side feature of ExtensionJobChecker which cannot be tested via vitest server component tests. Browser testing (agent-browser) is blocked due to Clerk middleware error.

steps.action: Run vitest test: renders SignInPrompt when user is not authenticated
Run vitest test: passes URL to SignInPrompt for redirect preservation
Run vitest test: renders SignInPrompt without URL when param is missing
steps.observed: PASS — SignInPrompt rendered, url is undefined

steps.action: Run vitest test: does not render ExtensionJobChecker for signed-out users

evidence.testResults: 4/4 signed-out tests passed — SignInPrompt rendered instead of ExtensionJobChecker when currentUser() returns null

assertions.title: Displays match status, parsed job info, and application history

steps.action: Run vitest test: renders main layout with ExtensionJobChecker
steps.observed: PASS — component receives prefillUrl, viewerEmail, viewerName

steps.action: Verify match status display, parsed job info, application history
steps.expected: Status badge, parsed fields, application entries visible
steps.observed: CANNOT VERIFY — these are client-side rendering concerns within ExtensionJobChecker component

evidence.testResults: Server-side tests confirm ExtensionJobChecker is rendered with correct props, but the component's internal rendering (status, parsed info, history) is client-side only

assertions.issues: Match status display, parsed job info, and application history are client-side rendering concerns within ExtensionJobChecker. Vitest server component tests only verify the component is mounted with correct props. Browser testing (agent-browser) blocked due to Clerk middleware error.

assertions.title: Mark-applied action available from fallback page

steps.action: Run vitest test: renders main layout with ExtensionJobChecker
Verify mark-applied button/action presence
steps.expected: Mark as Applied control present and interactable
steps.observed: CANNOT VERIFY — mark-applied action is client-side UI within ExtensionJobChecker

evidence.testResults: Server-side tests confirm ExtensionJobChecker is rendered (which should contain the mark-applied UI), but cannot verify the button exists or is interactable

assertions.issues: Mark-applied action is a client-side interactive element within ExtensionJobChecker. Vitest server component tests cannot verify button presence or interactability. Browser testing (agent-browser) blocked due to Clerk middleware error.

assertions.title: After sign-in redirect, URL parameter is preserved

steps.action: Run vitest test: passes URL to SignInPrompt for redirect preservation
steps.expected: SignInPrompt receives url prop for redirect

steps.action: Run vitest test: preserves complex URLs with query params and fragments
steps.expected: Complex URL preserved through server rendering

steps.action: Run vitest test: preserves URLs with encoded characters

evidence.testResults: 3 tests confirm URL preservation mechanism: SignInPrompt receives url for redirect, complex URLs with query params/fragments preserved, encoded characters preserved through round-trip

assertions.title: Missing or invalid URL parameter handled gracefully

steps.action: Run vitest test: renders without crash when URL parameter is missing
Run vitest test: renders without crash when URL is not-a-url
steps.observed: PASS — prefillUrl undefined (invalid URL filtered out)

steps.action: Run vitest test: renders without crash when URL parameter is empty string
Run vitest test: renders without crash when URL parameter is an array
Run vitest test: does not crash on completely missing searchParams keys
steps.observed: PASS — tree is truthy, ExtensionJobChecker rendered

evidence.testResults: 5/5 edge case tests passed — missing, invalid, empty, array, and absent URL params all handled gracefully without crashes

frictions.description: Clerk middleware error ('clerkMiddleware() was not run') prevents dev server page rendering, blocking agent-browser testing. Middleware at ./middleware.ts but Clerk expects ./src/middleware.ts. Cannot modify middleware.ts per AGENTS.md boundaries.
frictions.resolution: Fell back to vitest server component tests which mock Clerk auth, covering server-side rendering logic

blockers.description: Dev server returns 500 on /extension/check due to Clerk clerkMiddleware() not running. Middleware at ./middleware.ts but Clerk expects ./src/middleware.ts. Cannot modify middleware.ts per AGENTS.md boundaries. This prevents all browser-based (agent-browser) testing of the fallback page.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Used vitest with mocked Clerk auth as fallback testing tool. Server-side rendering logic fully covered; client-side behavior (auto-check, match display, mark-applied button) cannot be validated without browser.

summary: Tested 6 assertions via vitest (fallback from blocked agent-browser): 3 passed (VAL-FALLBACK-002, VAL-FALLBACK-005, VAL-FALLBACK-006), 3 blocked (VAL-FALLBACK-001, VAL-FALLBACK-003, VAL-FALLBACK-004 — require client-side browser interaction). All 22 vitest tests passed (22/22). Server-side rendering logic is fully validated: auth gating, URL parameter handling, prop passing, graceful error handling.
